files.bunfig.toml:
[install]
# Only install package versions published at least 3 days ago
minimumReleaseAge = 259200 # seconds

files.pnpm-workspace.yaml:
blockExoticSubdeps: true
minimumReleaseAge: 4320 # packages under 3 days old are simply rejected.
trustPolicy: no-downgrade
trustPolicyIgnoreAfter: 20160 # packages between 3 and 14 days old with no signature are also rejected.
engineStrict: true
